column2: p <- ggplot(tot, aes(hour_service, trips, color = day_type, group = day_type, text = hover_text)) +
# shaded bands (fixed fill so legend stays clean)
aes(x = hour_service, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
aes(x = hour_service, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
title = "Stop 3 — Frequency (BMT total service by hour)",
subtitle = "Lines show scheduled trips/hour. Shaded band is a visual range (schedule-based).",
xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE),
yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, fixedrange = TRUE, zeroline = FALSE)
config(displayModeBar = FALSE, scrollZoom = FALSE, doubleClick = FALSE)
